---
ID: US-OLV-112
Title: Open password security settings
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Introduce shared OliverDock and upload flows

As a employee
I want a command to open Microsoft security info
So that I can reach password/MFA settings from modules

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Accounts, HR, or SDR command metadata includes a change password/security action where configured.
- [ ] The action opens https://mysignins.microsoft.com/security-info in a new window.
- [ ] The new window uses noopener,noreferrer.
- [ ] The command does not navigate away from the app.

Notes: Named change-pw in command registries.
---
